case_title: SAM YUP BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION VS. SHUNDA TRADING CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SAM YUP BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAM YUP BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHUNDA TRADING CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 837 GRANT AVE., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67861345)
